creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
> It seems the cause commit was https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=bbab7f59e9630416397189df70ec133bdd690e38 , which removed Sparc support.

... and then, https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/devel/llvm15?id=f4206bd5200729a5d2263fb3ba5f662700f16c70 would fix this.
(I'm trying again after updating ports tree now, but it will take half a day.)
